name: Tabs
description: Organizes logically related but mutually exclusive content on a single page using the Tabs Next composition. One panel is visible at a time and selection can be controlled or uncontrolled.
import: import { TabsNext, TabBar, TabListNext, TabNext, TabNextTrigger, TabNextAction, TabNextPanel } from "@salt-ds/lab";

TabsNext.description: Root state container for tab selection, item registration, overflow coordination, and tab-panel mapping.

defaultValue.description: Initial selected tab value in uncontrolled mode.

value.description: Selected tab value in controlled mode.

onChange.description: Callback fired when selection changes. Event can be null when selection changes automatically.

children.description: Composed children: TabBar, TabListNext, TabNext items, TabNextTrigger, optional TabNextAction, and TabNextPanel.

TabBar.description: Visual container for the tab strip with optional inset and divider styling.

inset.description: Adds left and right padding to align with surrounding content.

TabListNext.description: Tab list container with role=tablist. Handles keyboard navigation, overflow behavior, and active styling variants.

activeColor.description: Styling active color variant for selected tab indicator/background mapping.

appearance.description: Visual appearance style for tab list.

aria-label.description: Accessible label for tab list, recommended when visible label context is not explicit.

TabNext.description: Container representing a single tab item. Must wrap TabNextTrigger and can optionally include TabNextAction.

value.description: Unique value for tab identity and tab-panel association within a TabsNext instance.

disabled.description: If true, tab cannot be selected by click/Enter/Space.

TabNextTrigger.description: Interactive trigger element rendered as role=tab button. Handles selection and focus behavior.

onKeyDown.description: Optional keyboard handler for advanced actions (e.g., Delete-to-dismiss patterns).

TabNextAction.description: Optional tab-level action control (for settings, dismiss, etc.) composed inside TabNext.

aria-label.description: Accessible label describing tab action (e.g., 'Dismiss tab').

TabNextPanel.description: Panel container for tab content. Visibility is managed by matching selected value from TabsNext.

value.description: Unique value matching corresponding TabNext value in same TabsNext instance.

states.selection: One tab selected at a time; panel with matching value is shown
states.overflow: When tabs exceed available width, hidden tabs are moved to overflow menu
states.disabled: Disabled tabs retain role semantics but do not trigger selection interactions

focusManagement.entry: Tab from outside enters tabs and lands on current tab stop
focusManagement.exit: Tab from tab item exits tab component to next focusable element
focusManagement.panel: TabNextPanel sets tabIndex=0 only when visible and without focusable descendants

keyboard.Tab: From outside enters tabs; from a focused tab exits to next element in tab order
keyboard.Shift+Tab: From inside tab component moves to previous element in tab order
keyboard.ArrowRight: Moves focus to next tab item in main tab list
keyboard.ArrowLeft: Moves focus to previous tab item in main tab list
keyboard.ArrowDown: Moves focus through overflow menu tab items when overflow menu is open
keyboard.ArrowUp: Moves focus through overflow menu tab items when overflow menu is open

aria: aria-selected on TabNextTrigger reflects selected state
aria-controls on TabNextTrigger links to associated TabNextPanel
aria-labelledby on TabNextPanel links back to associated tab
aria-disabled on tab trigger reflects disabled tabs
accessibility.screenReader: Use useAriaAnnouncer for dynamic add/remove/dismiss interactions to communicate updates.

composition.typical: TabsNext > TabBar > TabListNext > TabNext > TabNextTrigger, with TabNextPanel siblings mapped by matching value
with: Icons (left of label text in TabNextTrigger)
composition.nesting: Avoid nested TabsNext structures; use a single tabs layer per context.

patterns.basic: TabsNext with TabBar + TabListNext + matched TabNextPanel values
patterns.overflow: Large tab sets collapse into overflow menu
patterns.dismissible: TabNextAction used for dismiss tab with aria announcements
patterns.dynamic_add: TabBar supports add tab actions; new tab should become selected
